label: Transparent granite motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a granite texture motif from a mountain batholith, isolated as a single irregular polished stone slab cutout, no text.
Subject: A detailed granite surface showing white feldspar crystals, black mica flecks, and pink quartz grains. The stone should feel dense, structural, and infrastructure-grade, with a natural mineral grain and subtle chipped perimeter.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the slab. The silhouette may be an irregular rounded polygon, like a quarried sample tile, with visible speckled texture across the full subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting, solid infrastructure system mood, crisp mineral contrast, natural stone tactility.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no mountain landscape scene, no floor, no cast shadow, no reflection, no cartoon style, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Granite" derived from granite texture in a mountain batholith.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design-system presentation board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, crisp readable labels.
System feel: solid infrastructure system, durable, engineered, quiet, weight-bearing, precise.
Palette: white feldspar #f4f0e7, black mica #171513, pink quartz #c8917e, feldspar gray #9c9991, quarry shadow #4a4742, warm slab #ddd2c3, iron blush #a76554, polished edge #c7bfb3, structural ink #24211e.
Required visible sections: Morphous Granite, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; make all labels large enough to read at gallery preview size.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, component metric cards, bar/line/donut charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual language: pale feldspar background, dense speckled granite texture swatches, black mica text and borders, pink quartz primary actions, warm gray secondary controls, hard 6px to 8px radius, slab-like panels, crisp grid alignment, understated infrastructure dashboard.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock marketing hero, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Granite", no tiny illegible token table.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Granite design-system board. It must feel like the same solid infrastructure system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve granite texture, mountain batholith context, white feldspar, black mica, pink quartz, slab-like panels, hard 6px to 8px radius, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. Use the light board composition as the companion reference.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design-system presentation board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, crisp readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Granite, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: quarry-black and mica-charcoal background, feldspar off-white text, pink quartz primary accents, polished warm gray surfaces, granite speckle texture samples, durable infrastructure dashboard, restrained alerts and charts.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, bar/line/donut charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Granite", no tiny illegible token table.
